title: Multi-Factor Authentication with Dynamic QR Code Generator

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Multi-Factor Authentication with Dynamic QR Code Generator

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='200' height='50' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='110' y='70' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Registration</text>
  <rect x='50' y='150' width='200' height='50' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='110' y='170' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Login</text>
  <rect x='50' y='250' width='200' height='50' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='110' y='270' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>OTP Generator</text>
  <circle cx='200' cy='150' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <circle cx='200' cy='250' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <line x1='140' y1='200' x2='320' y2='200' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
  <line x1='140' y1='250' x2='320' y2='250' stroke='#B7D7CD' stroke-width='2'/>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a library like QRCode.react for dynamic QR code generation
Must support registration with username, password, and email
Must support login with username and password
Must generate a unique one-time password (OTP) for each login attempt
Must display a countdown timer for OTP expiration

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Multi-Factor Authentication with Dynamic QR Code Generator

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify registration, login, and OTP generator functionality, including dynamic QR code generation and OTP delivery.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
